summary:
Claim: *Streptococcus viridans* is the most common causative agent of bacterial endocarditis.  
Evidence: - Part of the viridans group streptococci commonly found in the oral flora; - Can enter the bloodstream during invasive procedures (e.g., dental work) and infect damaged heart valves.  
Answer: C
